description: This video discusses four key factors affecting crypto token unlocks, including the size of the unlock, liquidity, perpetual futures, and tokenomics.
topic_summary: Factors influencing token unlocks include unlock size [t=0:24], liquidity [t=10:24], perpetual futures [t=24:56], and tokenomics [t=39:21]. Understanding these can aid in analyzing projects and their unlocking schedules [t=49:05].
